pageProps.title: Conclusion
pageProps.content:
Conclusion

Thrift is a great framework for RPC. The latest fb thrift with new cpp2 framework makes it even more awesome. This tutorial tried to cover the cpp2 framework. It covers from a simple client server example to the internals of cpp2.

What next? I am planning to make a similar tutorial for proxygen. Proxygen is a framework to write high performance http services in C++

Connect to author: My name is Rajeev. You can reach me via my gmail id rajeevku02. Find more about me on the home page

Unrelated note: If you liked this tutorial and want to support the author then please download Lekh Diagram app by the author. This is a sketch recognition diagramming app for Android and iOS. The diagrams in this tutorial were drawn using the Lekh Diagram.
